title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving system reliability and expanding automation capabilities. We fixed licensing issues that could cause unexpected interruptions and enhanced our skills library with better organization and more comprehensive automation options for your revenue operations workflows.

entries.headline: Fixed licensing issues that caused workflow interruptions
details: Resolved problems where license validation could get stuck in endless loops
Added clear warnings when your license is approaching expiration
Improved license renewal process to prevent unexpected service disruptions

entries.headline: Enhanced automation skills library with better organization
details: Improved naming and organization of automation templates for easier discovery
Added missing templates for common revenue operations workflows
Cleaned up duplicate and misplaced automation options
